h_mode_phonon.imaginary_modes: Unlikely for H local mode; but CDW instability possible from overdoping

stability.phonon_gate: CONDITIONAL -- H stretch modes are real, but electronic instability from doping may cause soft modes
concerns: E_hull ~ 210 meV/atom far exceeds 50 meV/atom gate
Doping is wrong sign (electron doping, not hole doping)
H diffusion barrier too low for practical stability
possible_salvage: Add additional hole source (e.g., F substitution on another O site)
Use H+ (proton) intercalation instead of H- substitution
Consider partial substitution (1 H per formula unit instead of 2)

electronic.d_band_character: Cu d_{x2-y2} present but weight reduced by electron doping
electronic.AF_correlations: WEAKENED: Cu(+1.33) is far from Mott insulator (Cu+2)
electronic.d_wave_pairing_prospect: POOR: AF correlations needed for d-wave pairing likely suppressed
electronic.orbital_near_EF: Cu d_{x2-y2} + O 2p (standard cuprate-like, but doping wrong)
electronic.key_issue: Wrong doping direction (electron doping from H-)

gates.phonon: CONDITIONAL -- H stretch modes are real, but electronic instability from doping may cause soft modes

stability.phonon_gate: UNCERTAIN -- LiH modes are real, but interface modes may be soft
stability.doping_verdict: SEVERELY OVER-DOPED: Cu(+3) is far from optimal Cu(+2.15)
concerns: E_hull ~ 203 meV/atom far exceeds 50 meV/atom gate
Cu(+3) valence: severely over-doped for superconductivity
No known experimental precedent for CuO2/LiH interfaces

electronic.d_band_character: Cu d_{x2-y2} present but heavily over-doped (Cu+3)
electronic.AF_correlations: DESTROYED: far from half-filling, no Mott physics
electronic.d_wave_pairing_prospect: VERY POOR: no AF correlations => no spin-fluctuation d-wave pairing
